message:
chore(beads): refinement pass 2 — fix 2 missing cross-track deps, 5 content gaps

Structural fixes:
- Add missing G.3 → G.1 dep (G.3 creates BocpdDetector instances from G.1)
- Add missing H.2 → B.3 dep (H.2 modifies EvidenceLedgerWidget from B.3)
- Bump B.1 priority P1 → P0 (critical path, blocks 5 downstream beads)

Content fixes via --notes:
- B.1: Resolve JSONL buffering contradiction (BufWriter + flush per record)
- B.1: Clarify outcome backfill dual-write (in-memory update + JSONL line)
- C.2: Strengthen FTS sanitization test (whitelist approach, not blacklist)
- C.2: Coalesce test should verify result freshness (joiners get leader's value)
- D.1: Specify likelihood model skeleton (sigmoid-based, 4 states)
- D.1: Provide expected hand-calculation values for test 8
- D.2: Specify audit frame comparison mechanism (cell-by-cell buffer diff)
- D.2: Define missed-change response (warn log + posterior push + evidence)
- G.3: Add insufficient calibration data fallback ("Collecting data...")

Graph: 36 beads, 66 edges, 0 cycles, 13 ready, 0 alerts.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
